description.ko: 암석과 퇴적물에 기록된 역사를 드러내는 지구 지각의 상세한 지형학적 연구입니다.
description.en: A detailed topographical study of Earth's crust, revealing the history written in rock and sediment.

prompt: Hyper-realistic top-down satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Strata Chronicle.' A macro perspective of a deep tectonic rift where #8B4513 sienna and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers reveal ancient geological narratives. Deep #2F4F4F slate mineral veins cut through the rock like frozen lightning, while sharp #F4A460 sand drifts fill the crevices. Tactile texture showing grain-level detail, cinematic natural lighting with long shadows, 8k resolution, emphasizing the raw power of the earth.
